title: キタサンブラック登場！

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I am the daughter of a certain enka singer.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And when I was still a child, I made a promise.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It was an extremely important promise with my
best friend, Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
A big race, huh? So you wanna run in one too,
Dia!

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Same here! I wanna make everyone smile while
running, just like how my dad makes people smile
with his singing!

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Dia? Why do you wanna run in races?

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text:
Um... I wanna win a G1 race. I think that's the
reason why I was born.

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! Let's both go to Tracen, then! We'll be
able to run together there if we do!

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Kita! Okay, it's a promise! Let's run in the
Classic Triple Crown too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I had Dia, of course, but I also met an Horsegirl I
really admired. She inspired me to become just
like her.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Tokai Teio! Tokai Teio is the champion of the
Satsuki Sho! We just witnessed a glimpse of her
magnificent talent here, folks!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaall right! That's one crown down! The legend
of the Invincible Teio is just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Teio is my role model and I aspire to be like her,
while Dia is my dear friend who runs alongside
me. And my father is a person I've always
respected.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm so lucky. I'm surrounded by people who can
help me achieve my dream, and I love every
single one of them. And now...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All I gotta do is see things to the end! I'm gonna
be an Umamusume who puts smiles on people's
faces!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Traineeer! I'm sooo sooorry!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant, huff! I can't believe it... I can't believe I'm late on the first day of the Twinkle Series...
choice_data_list: Were you off helping someone again?
Were you off helping someone again?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! I stopped to help push a minivan that got
stuck on a slope and didn't notice the time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the Umamusume I'm in charge of, Kitasan
Black.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's the type that simply can't walk away from
someone in need, and if I had to say what her
biggest strength is...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Raaah! Two ramp sprints down, one more to go!
I'm nowhere near done yet!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant... Whew... I'm exhausted!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd say it's her hardiness and ability to withstand
intense training. We'll be challenging the Twinkle
Series with that strength of hers.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Good job, Kita. You're working so hard already.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Dia! And of course I am. I've been waiting
my whole life for this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Satono Diamond, Kitasan Black's
childhood friend and the daughter of the Satono
family, which runs a large company of the same
name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When they were young, they promised each other
to run in the Triple Classic Crown together.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You might have beat me in registering for the
series...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I'll catch up with you in a heartbeat. And once
I do, let's do our best... as peers.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I may be one step closer than you to
debuting, but you're way more knowledgeable
when it comes to stuff like racing strategy.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I still have a lot to learn, but I've gotta get to the
point where I can run ahead and pull Dia along
like I used to when we were young.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, let's practice on a wood chip
track, Trainer! I can still keep going!
choice_data_list: You've got it! I won't go easy on you!
You've got it! I won't go easy on you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she's still inexperienced, Kitasan Black
is earnest, focused, and highly resilient.
Slumbering within her is unlimited potential for
growth.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I'm not very graceful, and I've only got my
tenacity going for me... But my desire to make
people happy is greater than anyone's!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I'm going to stay positive, keep moving forward,
and give it my all until the very end!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's right, it all begins here. This is the path to
realizing my dream!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'll be running my very best alongside
Dia and Teio on the grandest of stages!
